 function PhotoPanel({side,photo,status,progress,error,warnings=[],onSelect,onRotate,onRemove,onRead}){
  const inputId=`packet-${side}-photo`,title=side==='front'?'Front of packet':'Back of packet',description=side==='front'?'Usually identifies the crop, variety, and brand.':'Usually contains planting and growing instructions.';
- return <article className={`packet-photo-panel ${photo?'has-photo':''}`}><div className="packet-photo-heading"><span><small>{side.toUpperCase()} PHOTO</small><strong>{title}</strong><em>{description}</em></span>{photo&&<span className={`packet-photo-state state-${status?.replace(/\s+/g,'-').toLowerCase()}`}>{status}</span>}</div><label htmlFor={inputId} className="packet-photo-drop">{photo?<img src={photo} alt={`${title} preview`}/>:<><Camera/><strong>Take or choose {side} photo</strong><small>JPEG, PNG, or WebP</small></>}<input id={inputId} type="file" accept="image/jpeg,image/png,image/webp" capture="environment" onChange={event=>{const file=event.target.files?.[0];if(file)onSelect(file);event.target.value=''}}/></label>{status==='Reading packet'&&<div className="packet-processing" role="status" aria-live="polite"><ScanText/><span><strong>Reading packet</strong><small>{Math.round((progress||0)*100)}% · this stops automatically if reading takes too long</small></span></div>}{error&&<p className="packet-photo-error" role="alert"><AlertTriangle/>{error}</p>}{warnings.length>0&&<ul className="packet-photo-warnings">{warnings.map(item=><li key={item}>{item}</li>)}</ul>}{photo&&<div className="packet-photo-actions"><label htmlFor={inputId} className="button-like"><RefreshCw/>Retake</label><button type="button" onClick={onRotate} aria-label={`Rotate ${title} clockwise`}><RotateCw/>Rotate</button><button type="button" onClick={onRead} disabled={status==='Reading packet'}><ScanText/>Read again</button><button type="button" onClick={onRemove} aria-label={`Remove ${title}`}><Trash2/>Remove</button></div>}</article>;
+ return <article className={`packet-photo-panel ${photo?'has-photo':''}`}><div className="packet-photo-heading"><span><small>{side.toUpperCase()} PHOTO</small><strong>{title}</strong><em>{description}</em></span>{photo&&<span className={`packet-photo-state state-${status?.replace(/\s+/g,'-').toLowerCase()}`}>{status}</span>}</div><label htmlFor={inputId} className="packet-photo-drop">{photo?<img src={photo} alt={`${title} preview`}/>:<><Camera/><strong>Take or choose {side} photo</strong><small>JPEG, PNG, or WebP</small></>}<input id={inputId} type="file" accept="image/jpeg,image/png,image/webp" capture="environment" onChange={event=>{const file=event.target.files?.[0];if(file)onSelect(file);event.target.value=''}}/></label>{status==='Analyzing packet'&&<div className="packet-processing" role="status" aria-live="polite"><ScanText/><span><strong>Analyzing front and back together</strong><small>Building a verified packet record.</small></span></div>}{error&&<p className="packet-photo-error" role="alert"><AlertTriangle/>{error}</p>}{warnings.length>0&&<ul className="packet-photo-warnings">{warnings.map(item=><li key={item}>{item}</li>)}</ul>}{photo&&<div className="packet-photo-actions"><label htmlFor={inputId} className="button-like"><RefreshCw/>Retake</label><button type="button" onClick={onRotate} aria-label={`Rotate ${title} clockwise`}><RotateCw/>Rotate</button><button type="button" onClick={onRemove} aria-label={`Remove ${title}`}><Trash2/>Remove</button></div>}</article>;

  const retryLookup=async()=>{setLookup({status:'searching',candidates:[],otherCandidates:[],primaryCandidate:null,error:'',liveVerification:null});try{const result=await lookupSeedProducts(seedLookupIdentity(draft),{ignoreCache:true,verifyOnline:false});setLookup({...result,status:result.primaryCandidate?'candidates':'none',error:''})}catch(error){console.error('[Runyan Garden] exact packet lookup retry failed',error);setLookup({status:'error',candidates:[],otherCandidates:[],primaryCandidate:null,error:'Exact-product lookup could not finish. Continue with packet text or manual entry.',liveVerification:null})}};
 
  const processPhoto=async(side,dataUrl,force=false)=>{const key=`${side}:${dataUrl.length}:${dataUrl.slice(-80)}`;if(!force&&processed.current.has(key))return;processed.current.add(key);setSideState(side,{status:'Reading packet',progress:0,error:''});try{const extraction=await readPacketPhoto(dataUrl,{side,onProgress:message=>setSideState(side,{status:'Reading packet',progress:message.progress||0})});setDraft(current=>applyPacketExtraction(current,extraction));const status=side==='front'?(extraction.quality==='identity'?'Packet identity found':extraction.quality==='partial'?'Partial packet identity found':'Exact product lookup needed'):'Growing details found';se
